required_contains.text: as a 216,000-block cooldown, roughly 30 days, with `DelegateTxRateLimitExceeded` returned when the
cooldown is breached. That cooldown gates the `increase_take` path specifically, while
`decrease_take` takes effect immediately, so a validator can lower commission at any time but cannot
raise it again until the window clears

forbidden_contains.text: as a 216,000-block cooldown, roughly 30 days, between successful delegate-take changes, with

delegators because a validator's commission cannot be raised again immediately after a prior
